639.reason: // The stack capacity is MAX (101), so valid indices are 0 to 100. The condition should be `S->top == MAX - 1` to check if full. Using `MAX-2` incorrectly allows one extra push beyond capacity.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  // The stack capacity is MAX (101), so valid indices are 0 to 100. The condition should be `S->top == MAX - 1` to check if full. Using `MAX-2` incorrectly allows one extra push beyond capacity.

663.reason: // The loop condition is incorrect. `scanf` returns the number of successfully read items, not the value read. It should continue until `jud == -1`, but this condition will never break because `scanf` returns 1 on success, not -1. Also, it doesn't stop when `jud == -1`.
